external_references.source_name: Black Hills Information Security TruffleHog January 2024
external_references.description: Chris Traynor. (2024, January 18). Rooting For Secrets with TruffleHog. Retrieved April 15, 2026.
Trufflesecurity. (2026, April 8). TruffleHog Enterprise. Retrieved April 15, 2026.

objects.description: [TruffleHog](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9009) can enumerate cloud storage environments including Amazon Web Service (AWS) S3 buckets and Google Cloud Storage buckets.(Citation: Black Hills Information Security TruffleHog January 2024)(Citation: Github TruffleSecurity Trufflehog April 2025)
